bundle.name: stark-plan
bundle.description: Turn a design doc into a phased implementation plan, then decompose it into phased GitHub issues with story points and risk labels. Maps to spec-kit's plan + tasks phases.

artifacts.name: stark-plan-to-tasks
artifacts.description: Decompose spec/plan into phased GitHub issues with story points and risk labels. Use for plan to tasks, decompose plan.

artifacts.name: stark-spec-to-plan
artifacts.description: Convert design docs into phased implementation plans via paired lead/wing agents. Lead drafts, wing reviews, fix-loop until approved. Use for plan from design/spec.
